description: You are an agricultural field inspector. Format the raw field notes in /home/ga/Documents/sunny_creek_audit_report.odt into a formal NOP organic certification audit report using the specification at /home/ga/Desktop/certifier_formatting_rules.txt. The report must include a bold, centered title 'Sunny Creek Organics - Annual On-Site Inspection Report' (>=16pt) with a Table of Contents below it. Apply Heading 1 to the six main sections (General Information, Organic System Plan Verification, Natural Resources, Seeds and Planting Stock, Crop Pest and Disease Management, Audit Trail and Traceability) and Heading 2 to the four subsections (Buffer Zones, Input Materials, Crop Rotation, Non-Compliance Citations). Convert crop data into a 3-column table, format input materials as a bulleted list, bold all '7 CFR § 205.XXX' citations, and justify the body text. Save the final document to /home/ga/Documents/sunny_creek_audit_report.odt.

metadata.title_text: Sunny Creek Organics - Annual On-Site Inspection Report
body_alignment_samples: The inspection was conducted on August 14, 2025
All seeds used during the current organic production cycle
